---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a technical issue or unexpected behavior in GitHub Smart Downloader"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## 🛑 Problem Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📍 Repository URL

Provide the URL of the GitHub repository where the issue occurred (if applicable).
_Example: https://github.com/sserdardundar/GitHub Smart Downloader_

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Perform action '...'
4. See error '...'

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem (drag and drop images here).

## 💻 Environment Information

- **GitHub Smart Downloader Version**: [e.g., 2.2.0]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome, Brave, Edge]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS, Linux]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., error messages from the console).
